positive: A detailed botanical illustration of rare bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns, rendered in a delicate watercolor and ink style. Include stylized insects like butterflies and beetles among the foliage. Cottagecore aesthetic, natural color palette, high detail, clean lines, hyper-detailed, whimsical.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, harsh shadows, digital painting
